message:
feat(audit): Add verify and timeline subcommands

Extend the fcp audit CLI with two new subcommands for audit chain
analysis and visualization:

fcp audit verify:
- Verify integrity of an audit chain against its head
- Validate event sequence numbers are contiguous
- Check cryptographic hash chain linkage
- Ensure all events belong to the specified zone
- Support JSON output for CI integration
- Accept events and head from files or stdin

fcp audit timeline:
- Render a chronological timeline of audit events
- Filter by zone for focused analysis
- Human-readable format with timestamps and actors
- JSON output mode for programmatic consumption

Implementation details:
- Add AuditEventRecord struct for parsing event records
- Add AuditVerifyStatus enum (Ok/Warn/Fail) for validation results
- Add VerifyArgs and TimelineArgs CLI argument structs
- Implement run_verify() and run_timeline() handlers
- Support both JSONL and JSON array input formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
